meaning: n.[律]宣布不合格,取消资格
examples: He said the court provided no guidance about when recusal will be constitutionally required.
Tightening rules for recusal would help, says James Sample of New York University’s Brennan Centre.
"Even one unnecessary recusal impairs the functioning of the Court, " the seven Justices say in their policy.
The statute sets out one general and several specific conditions that warrant recusal.
